final:
module sram_cell (
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    input wire enable,
    output reg [3:0] data_out,
    input wire clk
);

    reg [3:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (enable) begin memory <= data_in ; // Write data to SRAM
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  data_out <= memory ;
  end
endmodule
